hook: I searched the resume. Bad news.
subhook: This is the search test most vague bullets fail.
weakBullets: Managed customer conversations and followed up with prospects.
Responsible for sales opportunities in assigned territory.
Worked with marketing and customer success on accounts.
beforeBullet: Responsible for sales opportunities in assigned territory.
afterBullet: Generated $1.8M in qualified Salesforce pipeline through 42 monthly discovery calls and MEDDICC-based account prioritization.

resumeDocument.name: Maya Torres
resumeDocument.headline: Account Executive
resumeDocument.summary: Quota-carrying SaaS seller with 4 years across SDR and AE roles, focused on discovery, account prioritization, CRM hygiene, and mid-market pipeline creation.

bullets: Managed customer conversations and followed up with prospects.
Responsible for sales opportunities in assigned territory.
Worked with marketing and customer success on accounts.
Maintained Salesforce notes, next steps, and close-date updates for active opportunities.
Generated $1.8M in qualified Salesforce pipeline through 42 monthly discovery calls and MEDDICC account notes.
Booked discovery meetings with operations and finance leaders.
Researched account triggers and personalized outbound email sequences.
Qualified inbound leads and routed opportunities to three AE teams.

jobDescription.title: Mid-Market Account Executive
jobDescription.summary: TargetCo is hiring a Mid-Market Account Executive who can connect practical execution with measurable business outcomes.
responsibilities: Use Salesforce and pipeline generation to improve team execution and reporting.
Translate work into measurable outcomes tied to quota attainment.
Partner cross-functionally and communicate progress clearly to stakeholders.

score_rubric.label: Signal Fit Score
score_rubric.beforeExplanation: The original line forces the reviewer to infer tools, scope, and outcome.
score_rubric.afterExplanation: The rewrite puts the job terms, metric proof, and outcome on the page.

evidenceLedger.proofLine: Generated $1.8M in qualified Salesforce pipeline through 42 monthly discovery calls and MEDDICC account notes.

visibleFacts.source: skills section and later pipeline bullet
skills section and later pipeline bullet

humanReadBeats.text: Read the exact resume line: Responsible for sales opportunities in assigned territory.
The sales work may be there; the pipeline proof is not.
Point to the visible source evidence in BrightLedger experience, later pipeline bullet: Generated $1.8M in qualified Salesforce pipeline through 42 monthly discovery calls and MEDDICC account notes.
Compare it to the job requirement: Salesforce, pipeline generation, quota attainment.
Explain the visible rubric before the score: 37/100.
Rewrite only the same experience: generated 1.8 million in qualified Salesforce pipeline.

problemPunchline: A reviewer cannot search for what you meant to say.
teardownPunchline: The low score is from hidden tool and result proof in the rubric.
fixPunchline: Now the search term points to real evidence.

delivery: Sounds like a recruiter reading the resume live.
Short pause after the weak bullet and before the score reason.
No corporate polish, no trailer voice, no product-demo cadence.

humanReadBeats.text: Read the exact resume line: Responsible for sales opportunities in assigned territory.
The sales work may be there; the pipeline proof is not.
Point to the visible source evidence in BrightLedger experience, later pipeline bullet: Generated $1.8M in qualified Salesforce pipeline through 42 monthly discovery calls and MEDDICC account notes.
Compare it to the job requirement: Salesforce, pipeline generation, quota attainment.

Rewrite only the same experience: generated 1.8 million in qualified Salesforce pipeline.

voiceover_text: Here is the search test. I search Salesforce and pipeline generation. Then I read: Responsible for sales opportunities in assigned territory. I would circle that because the proof is buried lower down: Generated $1.8M in qualified Salesforce pipeline through 42 monthly discovery calls and MEDDICC account notes. So the visible line starts at 37. Rewrite it: Generated $1.8M in qualified Salesforce pipeline through 42 monthly discovery calls and MEDDICC-based account prioritization. Now the search terms and result are together: 88. Run the free Signal score before you apply.
